mapper.select:
SELECT N.NOTICE_ID , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONTENT , NOTICE_DATE , N.USER_ID , IS_IMPORTANT
, IMG_NUM , ORIGIN_IMG_NAME , ATTACHED_IMG_NAME
FROM NOTICE N
INNER JOIN NOTICE_IMG I ON N.NOTICE_ID = I.NOTICE_ID
WHERE N.NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}

SELECT ATTACHED_IMG_NAME FROM NOTICE_IMG WHERE NOTICE_ID IN
#{noticeId}
